templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA Standard Terms, allowing each party to disclose and protect confidential information shared for a stated purpose.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Companion Cover Page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to fill in the parties, purpose, and any modifications to the Standard Terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing access to and use of a hosted/SaaS cloud service.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access partners who use a product and provide feedback during its development.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime targets, response times, and related service commitments for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement covering services delivered under statements of work (SOWs).

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement addressing controller/processor and subprocessor obligations for processing personal data.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a license to install and use software on customer-controlled systems.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement setting out each party's obligations, fees, and cooperation terms for a business partnership.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited evaluation of a product during a pilot period.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-covered handling of protected health information (PHI).

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an agreement to cover use of AI services, inputs/outputs, model training, and related restrictions.
